import io
import string

fn find_eq(_ s: String) -> Option<Int>
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut found = -1
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 61
        found = i
        i = n
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
  end
  if found < 0
    None
  else
    Some(found)
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut running = true
  while running
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line)
      match find_eq(line)
      when Some(pos)
        let key = string.substring(line, 0, pos)
        let value = string.substring(line, pos + 1, string.len(line))
        print("#{key}:#{value}")
      when None
      end
    when None
      running = false
    end
  end
end
